text_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

opentelemetry_span_log.engine: engine MergeTree partition by toYYYYMM(finish_date) order by (finish_date, finish_time_us, trace_id) TTL finish_date + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900
